topics.title: DustShield: Electrodynamic Dust Shield Digital Twin
topics.problem_statement: Physical testing of lunar Electrodynamic Dust Shields (EDS) is costly and slow; a digital twin is required to visualize particle kinetics and telemetry in real-time.

research_gap.why_it_matters: Enables engineers to sweep parameters (voltage, phase, frequency) and view clearing dynamics before hardware fabrication.
research_gap.current_limitation: No open-source digital twins exist that bridge control interfaces with physical serial telemetry.

your_approach.novel_angle: Interactive 3D particle simulation driven by real-time sliders that mirror actual MCU control registers, including Web Serial telemetry expansion.
your_approach.key_insight: Translating multi-phase AC parameters directly into a visual traveling wave velocity field.
your_approach.compared_to_papers: Replaces static graphs with dynamic, interactive 3D particle clearing loops and efficiency degradation curves.

mvp_features.name: Three.js Lunar Scene
mvp_features.verification_method: Visually verify rendering at 60 FPS in browser console.

mvp_features.name: Empirical Particle Physics Engine
subparts: Voltage and phase directional velocity transport
mvp_features.verification_method: Verify particles deactivate when crossing panel borders.

mvp_features.name: Real-time Telemetry Dashboard
mvp_features.verification_method: Verify slider adjustments instantly trigger updates in particle physics constants.

success_metrics.primary: Clearing speed and efficiency mapping accuracy vs. NASA experimental curves
success_metrics.baseline_from_papers: Physical systems show >90% clearing in 10-30 seconds depending on voltage.
success_metrics.your_target: 95%+ visual cleaning convergence, zero frame lag during simulation
success_metrics.improvement: 100% reduction in optimization cycle time via virtual sweeping

dataset.name: NASA LHS-1 Lunar Simulant Particle Distribution
dataset.train_test_split: 60% small (<45um), 20% medium (45-100um), 20% large (>100um) ratio in particle system

risks: Numerical instability in particle collision -> Mitigated by treating particles as non-colliding points
Browser performance degradation with high particle counts -> Mitigated by limiting system size to 150-200 particles

topics.title: Solar Panel Power-Aware Dust Mitigation Controller
topics.problem_statement: EDS systems run on a static timer, causing unnecessary power drain on small satellites during low-sun orbits.

research_gap.why_it_matters: Active dust clearing should only activate when solar irradiance is sufficient and dust accumulation drops output below a threshold.
research_gap.current_limitation: Power management systems do not close the loop with active electrostatic dust cleaning schedules.

your_approach.novel_angle: An adaptive control loop that evaluates MPPT curves and schedules high-voltage pulses only when net energy yield is positive.
your_approach.key_insight: Modeling the cost-benefit trade-off of the power required for flyback charging vs. recovered solar cell efficiency.
your_approach.compared_to_papers: Extends existing static EDS timers to dynamic solar efficiency triggers.

mvp_features.name: MPPT Irradiance Modulator
mvp_features.verification_method: Assert positive net energy yield across simulated orbit.

success_metrics.baseline_from_papers: Static EDS runs reduce net energy by 15% during eclipse.
success_metrics.your_target: Maintain >98% battery state of charge across orbit

risks: Incorrect battery state estimates -> Mitigated by conservative power thresholds

why_3_topics: We chose these topics because they bridge the physical constraints of lunar space operations with modern software simulations, satisfying the FAR AWAY hardware-software synergy requirements.
recommendation: Topic 1 (DustShield Digital Twin) is highly recommended due to its direct mapping of high-voltage parameters, strong Three.js interactive capability, and seamless hardware telemetry integration readiness.
